title: chiococca nitida var. chimantensis
intro: Chiococca nitida var. chimantensis, also known as Chimantensis Chiococca or White Frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Its health benefits include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Chiococca nitida var. chimantensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
